text:
On Wed, 15 Sep 1999, Bill Fenner wrote:

> Hm, perhaps pkg/DESCR shouldn't mention that this is a Linux server

I just copied the text off the web site, so you can tweak it however you
want. In fact, this sounds like a good change; go for it.

-- Richard
